tasks.title: Set wedding date
tasks.description: Choose and confirm the wedding date

tasks.title: Create guest list
tasks.description: Compile initial guest list with contact information

tasks.title: Set budget
tasks.description: Determine overall wedding budget and allocate by category

tasks.title: Choose wedding style/theme
tasks.description: Decide on wedding style, colors, and theme

tasks.title: Research and visit venues
tasks.description: Research potential venues and schedule visits

tasks.title: Book venue
tasks.description: Sign contract and pay deposit for chosen venue

tasks.title: Taste test catering options
tasks.description: Schedule and attend catering tastings

tasks.title: Finalize catering menu
tasks.description: Confirm final menu selections and dietary options

tasks.title: Research photographers
tasks.description: Look for photographers that match your style

tasks.title: Book photographer
tasks.description: Sign contract and pay deposit

tasks.title: Book videographer
tasks.description: Research and book wedding videographer

tasks.title: Schedule engagement photos
tasks.description: Plan and schedule engagement photo session

tasks.title: Shop for wedding dress
tasks.description: Start shopping for the perfect wedding dress

tasks.title: Order wedding dress
tasks.description: Place order for wedding dress (allow time for alterations)

tasks.title: Book hair and makeup artist
tasks.description: Research and book hair and makeup services

tasks.title: Schedule dress fittings
tasks.description: Plan multiple fittings leading up to wedding

tasks.title: Design save-the-dates
tasks.description: Create or order save-the-date cards

tasks.title: Send save-the-dates
tasks.description: Mail or send digital save-the-dates

tasks.title: Order wedding invitations
tasks.description: Design and order wedding invitations

tasks.title: Send wedding invitations
tasks.description: Mail invitations 6-8 weeks before wedding

tasks.title: Book DJ or band
tasks.description: Research and book music entertainment

tasks.title: Create playlist
tasks.description: Compile must-play and do-not-play song lists

tasks.title: Book ceremony musicians
tasks.description: If separate from reception, book ceremony music

tasks.title: Meet with florist
tasks.description: Consult with florist about arrangements

tasks.title: Finalize flower arrangements
tasks.description: Confirm all floral arrangements and centerpieces

tasks.title: Plan décor and rentals
tasks.description: Decide on decorations and rental items needed

tasks.title: Order décor items
tasks.description: Purchase or rent all décor elements

tasks.title: Finalize guest count
tasks.description: Confirm final RSVP count with venue and caterer

tasks.title: Create seating chart
tasks.description: Assign guests to tables

tasks.title: Confirm all vendors
tasks.description: Touch base with all vendors to confirm details

tasks.title: Pack for honeymoon
tasks.description: Prepare and pack for honeymoon trip

tasks.title: Final dress fitting
tasks.description: Last dress fitting and pickup

tasks.title: Rehearsal dinner
tasks.description: Plan and attend rehearsal dinner
